title: Setup Kubernetes Infrastructure (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Deploy core infrastructure components and operators
details:
1. Deploy namespace structure (databases, messaging, kafka)
2. Install CloudNative-PG operator for PostgreSQL
3. Install Redis/Valkey operator
4. Install Strimzi operator for Kafka
5. Install Percona MongoDB operator
6. Install RabbitMQ operator
7. Create network policies for service isolation
8. Setup monitoring namespace and RBAC
9. Deploy Prometheus and Grafana for observability
10. Verify all operators are running and ready
testStrategy: Check all operators are running, namespaces created, verify connectivity between services

title: Deploy Database Infrastructure (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Provision PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, Kafka, and RabbitMQ
details:
1. Deploy PostgreSQL cluster using CloudNative-PG CRD
2. Create alerthub database and user
3. Deploy Redis/Valkey instance for caching and rate limiting
4. Deploy Kafka cluster with Strimzi CRD
5. Create notification-events topic
6. Deploy MongoDB instance using Percona operator
7. Create alerthub database in MongoDB
8. Deploy RabbitMQ cluster
9. Create delivery-jobs exchange and queue
10. Setup connection secrets and ConfigMaps for services
testStrategy: Verify database connections, create test records, check Kafka topics, validate queue operations

title: Implement Notification Router Core (Rex - Rust/Axum)
description: Build the high-performance notification routing service
details:
1. Setup Rust project with Axum, tokio, sqlx dependencies
2. Define data models (Notification, NotificationStatus, Channel)
3. Implement database layer with sqlx migrations
4. Create REST endpoints: POST /notifications, GET /notifications/:id
5. Add batch endpoint: POST /notifications/batch
6. Implement rate limiting with Redis
7. Setup priority queue processing
8. Add deduplication logic with TTL
9. Integrate Kafka producer for event streaming
10. Add health checks and metrics endpoints
testStrategy: Unit tests for business logic, integration tests with database, load testing for throughput requirements

title: Add WebSocket Support (Rex - Rust/Axum)
description: Implement real-time notification updates via WebSocket
details:
1. Add WebSocket handler at /api/v1/ws endpoint
2. Implement connection management with tenant-based rooms
3. Setup Redis pub/sub for multi-instance WebSocket support
4. Add authentication for WebSocket connections
5. Implement notification broadcast on status changes
6. Add connection health checks and auto-reconnect
7. Implement proper connection cleanup on disconnect
8. Add rate limiting for WebSocket messages
9. Setup monitoring for concurrent connections
10. Test WebSocket scalability with 1000+ connections
testStrategy: WebSocket connection tests, message delivery verification, concurrent connection limits, reconnection testing

title: Implement Admin API Core (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
description: Build tenant, user, and rules management API
details:
1. Setup Go project with gRPC and grpc-gateway
2. Define protobuf schemas for TenantService, UserService, RuleService
3. Generate Go code and REST gateway
4. Implement database layer with GORM/pgx
5. Build TenantService CRUD operations
6. Build UserService with JWT authentication
7. Implement NotificationRule engine with conditions/actions
8. Add RBAC middleware (owner, admin, member, viewer)
9. Setup audit logging for all operations
10. Add API documentation with Swagger
testStrategy: gRPC client tests, REST API tests, RBAC permission testing, audit log verification

title: Add Analytics Service (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
description: Implement notification statistics and delivery metrics
details:
1. Define AnalyticsService protobuf schema
2. Create analytics data models and aggregation tables
3. Implement GetNotificationStats endpoint
4. Add GetDeliveryMetrics with time-series data
5. Setup background aggregation jobs (daily/weekly/monthly)
6. Add Redis caching for frequently accessed metrics
7. Implement real-time dashboard data endpoints
8. Add export functionality for analytics data
9. Setup data retention policies
10. Create performance-optimized queries with indexing
testStrategy: Analytics accuracy testing, performance testing for large datasets, cache hit rate validation

title: Implement Integration Service Core (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
description: Build channel integration management with Effect
details:
1. Setup Bun project with Elysia, Effect, and Drizzle ORM
2. Define Effect Schema for Integration model and validation
3. Implement MongoDB connection with Drizzle
4. Create Integration CRUD endpoints with Effect error handling
5. Setup Effect Services for different channels (SlackService, DiscordService)
6. Implement OAuth2 flows for Slack integration
7. Add template rendering system for notifications
8. Setup Effect.retry with exponential backoff for delivery
9. Add webhook signature verification
10. Implement integration testing endpoints
testStrategy: Effect error handling tests, integration connectivity tests, OAuth flow testing, template rendering validation

title: Add Channel Delivery Services (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
description: Implement Slack, Discord, email, and webhook delivery
details:
1. Implement SlackService with Bot API and webhooks
2. Build DiscordService with webhook delivery
3. Create EmailService with SMTP support (SendGrid, AWS SES)
4. Add WebhookService with custom HTTP endpoints
5. Implement PushService for FCM integration
6. Setup Kafka consumer for notification events using Effect Stream
7. Add RabbitMQ producer for delivery job queuing
8. Implement delivery status tracking and callbacks
9. Add rate limiting per channel with Effect Semaphore
10. Setup dead letter queue handling for failed deliveries
testStrategy: Channel delivery tests, rate limiting validation, retry mechanism testing, dead letter queue processing

title: Setup Service Deployment (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Deploy backend services with monitoring and scaling
details:
1. Create Kubernetes Deployments for each service
2. Setup Services (ClusterIP) for internal communication
3. Configure Ingress Controller with SSL termination
4. Add ConfigMaps for service configuration
5. Create Secrets for database credentials and API keys
6. Setup HorizontalPodAutoscaler for each service
7. Configure PodDisruptionBudgets for high availability
8. Add Prometheus ServiceMonitor for metrics collection
9. Setup centralized logging with structured JSON
10. Deploy network policies for security isolation
testStrategy: Service connectivity tests, auto-scaling verification, monitoring metrics validation, security policy testing

title: Implement Web Console Core (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Build main dashboard and notification management UI
details:
1. Setup Next.js 15 project with App Router and TypeScript
2. Install Effect, shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS, and TanStack Query
3. Create Effect Schema for API response validation
4. Build authentication system with JWT tokens
5. Implement dashboard with notification overview
6. Create NotificationFeed component with real-time updates
7. Build notification history page with filters and pagination
8. Add WebSocket connection with Effect Stream integration
9. Setup error boundaries and toast notifications
10. Implement dark/light theme support
testStrategy: Component testing, WebSocket connection testing, authentication flow validation, responsive design testing

title: Add Integration Management UI (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Build integration configuration and management interface
details:
1. Create integrations listing page with status indicators
2. Build integration wizard with step-by-step setup
3. Implement OAuth2 flow for Slack integration
4. Add form validation with Effect Schema resolvers
5. Create integration testing interface
6. Build template editor for notification formatting
7. Add integration cards with quick actions
8. Implement drag-and-drop for integration ordering
9. Setup real-time status updates for integrations
10. Add integration analytics and delivery metrics
testStrategy: Form validation testing, OAuth flow testing, integration creation/update workflows, template rendering validation

title: Implement Rules Engine UI (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Build visual rule builder and management interface
details:
1. Create rules listing page with enable/disable toggles
2. Build visual rule builder with drag-and-drop interface
3. Implement condition builder (field, operator, value)
4. Add action configuration for rule outcomes
5. Create rule testing interface with sample notifications
6. Implement rule priority ordering with drag-and-drop
7. Add rule analytics showing trigger frequency
8. Setup rule validation and conflict detection
9. Create rule templates for common use cases
10. Add bulk operations for rule management
testStrategy: Rule builder functionality, condition logic testing, drag-and-drop interactions, rule execution validation

title: Implement Mobile App Core (Tap - Expo)
description: Build React Native app with push notifications
details:
1. Setup Expo project with SDK 50+ and TypeScript
2. Install navigation, NativeWind, and push notification libraries
3. Setup push notification registration with FCM/APNs
4. Implement authentication with biometric support
5. Build HomeScreen with notification feed
6. Create NotificationDetailScreen with actions
7. Add pull-to-refresh and offline caching
8. Implement deep linking for notification details
9. Setup app badge count for unread notifications
10. Add settings screen for notification preferences
testStrategy: Push notification delivery, biometric authentication, offline functionality, deep linking validation, cross-platform testing

title: Implement Desktop Client (Spark - Electron)
description: Build system tray application for desktop notifications
details:
1. Setup Electron project with React and TailwindCSS
2. Create system tray icon with context menu
3. Implement native desktop notification system
4. Build main window with notification feed
5. Add mini popup window for quick notifications
6. Setup keyboard shortcuts and global hotkeys
7. Implement auto-start on system boot
8. Add notification sound customization
9. Create settings window for preferences
10. Package for Windows, macOS, and Linux distribution
testStrategy: System tray functionality, native notifications, auto-start verification, cross-platform compatibility, packaging validation

title: Setup End-to-End Testing (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Implement comprehensive testing and monitoring pipeline
details:
1. Setup end-to-end test suite with Playwright/Cypress
2. Create notification flow tests (submit → route → deliver → display)
3. Setup load testing with K6 for throughput validation
4. Implement monitoring dashboards with Grafana
5. Add alerting rules for SLA violations
6. Setup automated testing pipeline with GitHub Actions
7. Create performance benchmarking suite
8. Implement health check aggregation across services
9. Setup log aggregation and searching
10. Add chaos engineering tests for resilience validation
testStrategy: Complete end-to-end user flows, performance under load, monitoring accuracy, alert notification validation, disaster recovery testing
